revision_priority: Add `Rails` to `## Skills` so every technology named in the TikTok bullets is source-backed.
Rewrite Summary sentence 1 to lead with data pipeline / ETL ownership instead of the transition narrative.
Reframe the opening summary so first-scan positioning is clear, body-supported, and anchored on the strongest role-aligned signal.
revision_instructions: Make three local edits: (1) In `## Skills`, add `Rails` to an existing bucket with framework/runtime tools, e.g. `Programming: Python, NumPy, Flask, Go, Java, Rails, REST, gRPC`; this resolves the R0 source mismatch without changing the experience bullets. (2) In `Professional Summary`, replace the first sentence with a role-aligned opener that foregrounds data pipelines, ETL, and operational data tooling, then mention the analytics-to-ML transition later if you still want it. (3) Remove bolding from modifier words in TikTok bullets, especially `team-maintained` and `team-owned`, and keep bold formatting reserved for technologies and quantitative results.
